---
title: PMS Surveillance
subtitle: StockViz
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: false
    lib_dir: analysis/rmdlib		
    includes:
        in_header: header.html
        after_body: ../footer.html
---

```{r dt_chunk, include=FALSE}

createdDate <- gsub(" 0", " ",format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y"))

```

---
date: `r createdDate`
---

*Source: [SEBI Portfolio Manager Monthly Report ](https://www.sebi.gov.in/sebiweb/other/OtherAction.do?doPmr=yes) *

```{r, calc_chunk, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
idPath <- "."
load(paste0(idPath, "/active_pms.RData"))

library('RODBC')
library('RPostgres')
library('quantmod')
library('tidyverse')

library('xtable')
library('knitr')
library('kableExtra')
library('DT')

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
options("scipen"=100)

#source("C:/stockviz/r/config.r")
source("/mnt/hollandr/config.r")

pmsMeta <- dbGetQuery(pgCon, "select * from sebi_pms_meta")

totalAumDf <- dbGetQuery(pgCon, "select id, yr, mth, spdData ->> 'Total' aum
                         from sebi_pms_data spd, 
                         jsonb_array_elements(spd.val) spdMain, 
                         jsonb_array_elements(spdMain -> 'data') spdData
                         where spdMain ->> 'main' like '%data for disc%' 
                         and spdMain ->> 'sub' like '%break-up of clients%' 
                         and spdData ->> 'Particulars' like '%aum%'")

totalAumDf <- totalAumDf |> mutate(aum = as.numeric(aum), 
                                   dt = as.Date(sprintf("%d-%d-%d", yr, mth, 
                                                        days_in_month(as.Date(sprintf("%d-%d-1", yr, mth))))))

grandTotalAum <- totalAumDf |> group_by(id) |> summarise(maxDt = max(dt)) |>
  inner_join(totalAumDf, by=join_by(id, maxDt == dt)) |> filter(aum > 0) |>
  inner_join(pmsMeta, by=join_by(id)) |>
  inner_join(idCnts, by=join_by(id)) |>
  select(pms_name, maxDt, aum) |> 
  rename(Name = pms_name, AsOf = maxDt, AUM = aum) |>
  mutate(AUM = round(AUM, 0), more = "") |>
  arrange(desc(AUM))


aumDT <- datatable(grandTotalAum, rownames = F, escape = c(rep(T, ncol(grandTotalAum)-1), F), 
                   class = 'cell-border stripe', filter='none', 
                   options = list(dom = 't', pageLength = nrow(grandTotalAum)))

```

## Discretionary Services

### Total Assets Under Management

```{r, aum_chunk, echo = FALSE, results='asis', message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

htmltools::tagList(
  print(aumDT)
)

```
